reviews.review_description: It’s a simple game, I’m not hating but I don’t see a reason to use this when their are way better examples. This is a good game if you’re angry, though. My full honest opinion…..yeah, it’s just a game. Thats kinda it. No action packed add ons, bundles, (I guess theres no point for either) or really anything. It’s just….a room. Thats the game, a room with breakable objects. Just a game, graphics dont serve purpose but their nice, and gameplay…………..no. Overall, it’s pretty much just a game and………thats it. Honest opinion, dont like, but an ok game for ragers or people who have TONS of built up anger you need to let out. I just personally don’t see why I would ever play this.

developer_response.body:
I appreciate you are trying to sound insightful with your review. But thats just it, It's a game which you have admitted yourself. I appreciate it isn't a game that you would play but you at least give it merit for other players with lots of anger to play (Target Audience). 
 
This game was developed by ONE person so the capabilities for bundles as you suggest are currently not applicable. 

Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description: not hating on it some ppl like it but me personally I dont

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing this free game developed by one person. You have given insightful constructive feedback.
Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description: My wife kelly placed a restraining order against me after the divorce and took the kids and the house, at first my way of reliving my stress was drinking and driving, but then i headed to my local beat buy and picked up that oculus i heard about on tictok, now i am jobless and i live in this virtual world proving that i do not need a family to be happy and enjoy life
My brother, hughjass n. Bals played the game for 24 hrs. And ended up killing me by smashing the controller into me. Not funny as I'm dead.
Smashy smack

I really had high hopes for this game, like for example when you grab one item you can't grab it again and everything's way too fragile I wanna be able to drop some things from 5 feet and it will not break. Also breaking animations would be a cool thing like if you threw flour at the wall it would explode white powder everywhere. Things like that.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Smashy Smashy VR is still early development and updates will be applied as they happen in the future.

reviews.review_description: For a free game, it was really cool. I'd recommend working on your controls and physics and add some more content, but a really great start.
wow this game is not bad

My son Finnigan Von Dickinsworth has been playing the game non-stop. I tried to get him to stop, but he doesn’t understand proper English anymore. Of course, I put him up for adoption, but he plays still. Curious, I purchased the game, and found utter disappointment and dissatisfaction throughout my experience, undoubtedly because of the games lack of morals. It continuously harassed my pure strength, critiquing my posture and form, until I gave up and left the game to rot. My experience was terrible, with no smashing to be done. I’m in tears, disappointed at the time wasted here, crying.

developer_response.body:
Nice troll review bro. 
I do hope that youngen Finnigan understands others in due time. 
I am disappointed to hear no smashing was done and even if you aren't a fan of this title i would encourage looking at other indie developers on Applabs some who are VERY talented. 
Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description:
I mean there isn't much to do other than smash stuff obviously. But the smashing is a tad janky, like I'll hit something and instead of it smashing it just bounces a little. The JoJo references are kinda funny though. 

There's not much to the game but it's worth a download for like 20 minutes of entertainment I guess.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Smashy Smashy VR. The app itself is currently under development (hence the App Labs listing), as a result future updates will roll out as they happen. 
Keep up to date with progress via the SideQuest listing for this app.

reviews.review_description: I’m just sayin that having guns scattered around like a pistol or smg or a shotgun would be stupid fun to just shoot things it would make the game 90x better

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Smashy Smashy VR. Your suggestion has been taken into consideration as well as other user feedback. 
We hope in future updates to provide fun methods of interacting with the environments which may include some form of projectiles. 
Thank you for being an early user to Smashy Smashy VR.

reviews.review_description: It’s good
Please add city map and guns and cars thanks for sords  its Riley good game play pls answer

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback. Ideas are in place for the next big update which is planned for Xmas 2022. Keep an eye out for our Holiday pack update. Happy Smashing!

reviews.review_description: Although the game is still having some bugs and updates being fixed this game is still very good! I don’t think I could ask more of a free still being made game. The game is still being updated and not finished I definitely recommend this game and think it’s great for stress relief. I think it is definitely worth downloading especially because this game is free. Looking forward to see the new updates and features in the future. Definitely recommend. Have fun smashing!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for downloading and playing Smashy Smashy VR. 
The Holiday update is due before Christmas and hoping it will add that bit more variety in the mix.

reviews.review_description: You should add abilities that we can use to smash the things, and u should add people to use the abilities with too. Just saying, they’re good ideas

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Smashy Smashy VR and your feedback.
You are just saying and that's exactly what we want, your say in what could make this app better. 
Leaving a note in general here. The current version out is our stable "vanilla" build of the app. We are hoping to make small improvements over the summer (small updated and 1-2 game modes) with the aim of releasing a "Holiday" pack in late Q4 2022 if possible.


I leave this feedback for other users to read also so there is a rough idea of what is planned and when. 

Summer 2022: Fixes/1-2 game modes. 
Q4. Holiday pack.

Thank you again for playing Smashy Smashy VR and hope future builds can provide a fuller experience.

reviews.review_title: I hate Mr banana man he made me smash pc
reviews.review_description: Man I love to get mad at fortnite and smash my computer man I got to hate it when that banana comes in and starts taking the L on me and shoots me with the double pump like what did I do to you Mr banana so then I throw my chair at my monitor and Mr banana man got shot by my teammate so I guess I wasted my monitor but oh well.
After installing the game today, my Oculus doesn't find tracking and just loops with the 'tracking lost' message

developer_response.body:
No offense dude but that sounds like a headset issue not the app. Make sure all your camera lenses on your oculus are clean for optimal tracking with your oculus. And that you have optimal lighting in the room you are playing in.
If you are still having issues with your headsets tracking please refer to this article that addresses the problem. https://uploadvr.com/tracking-lost-quest-2/#:~:text=Restart%20Your%20Quest,resolve%20the%20tracking%20lost%20error.

reviews.review_description: I think this game would be even better if you could fight people and have ragdoll physics like when you hit them they fall

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Smashy Smashy VR. Your feedback as been noted and is greatly appreciated (No really, im getting a lot of ideas). 
We hope we can provide an even better experience in future builds.

reviews.review_description: Game was bad do not suggest getting

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description: In the office there’s this one fire axe, I really want it so when I slice something, it actually breaks in the direction I slice it, hope this could be added into the game soon, super fun game!
